semantic.role: Barrel index file that aggregates and re-exports the public API of the infra/config module, providing a single import entry point for the Config facade and all configuration type definitions.
responsibilities: Re-export the Config class/interface from the config facade to provide a stable, public configuration interface.
Re-export all type definitions from config/types.js (e.g., SpineConfig and related types) to deliver a consistent type surface for configuration consumers.
outOfScope: Configuration validation, loading, or defaulting logic — those reside in the individual module files (facade, loader, validation, etc.).
Business logic or application-layer concerns — this file is purely an aggregation layer.
invariants: This file must remain a lightweight barrel that only re-exports from the config facade and types; it must not contain any implementation logic or imports from other submodules.
Any addition or removal of a re-export constitutes a change to the public API surface and must be reviewed accordingly.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a clean, unified import point for all configuration-related public symbols, shielding consumers from the internal module structure.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected for this file; the commit message references a v1.0.0 release with architectural governance, but this barrel likely remains stable.

publicSurface.description: The primary configuration interface for ArchSpine, exposed via the config facade. Consumers use this to access resolved configuration values.
All configuration type definitions (e.g., SpineConfig, environment settings) re‑exported to provide a stable, singular type surface for configuration consumers.
